rows.label: tev015701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev015701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Dart about this place.

rows.label: tev015701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev015701_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Dart if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev015701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Dart for his thoughts on the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev015701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Dart about recent developments.

rows.label: tev015701_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Dart about indigens
becoming enraged.

rows.label: tev015701_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Dart about salvaging wrecked Dolls.

rows.label: tev015701_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Dart about recent developments.

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0001
rows.name:
You see all these materials lying
around? Steel frames and whatnot?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0002
rows.name:
I told my Companion brother Beats over
there to get all this crap outta the way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0003
rows.name:
But he said we can't spare any people for
large-scale maintenance projects yet, so
we're just gonna leave 'em lying around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0004
rows.name:
If it wasn't for these things,
we could have big parties here
every night. What a waste![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0008
rows.name: Is Gerome eating at Army Pizza AGAIN?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0009
rows.name:
He's always talking about beating up xenoforms,
but if he's going to scarf down pizza every
day, he ain't gonna beat up anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, if my boss ain't going on a
mission, looks like I'm free to screw
around the rest of the day. Niiiice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0020
rows.name:
They talk all shy, and yet they have all this
crazy tech. And I don't think they understand
they're just a bunch of NLA freeloaders![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0021
rows.name: We're gonna have to teach 'em our rules.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0022
rows.name:
You wanna rat on 'em to the Companion? If so, my
brother Beats is standing guard over there. ...If
you call that slouching "standing guard."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0023
rows.name:
Aw, who am I kidding? You're too big of a deal to
be wasting your time on getting a few Ma-non in
line. Now hurry up and wreck the Growth already![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0030
rows.name:
Gerome needed to vent some of his
anger issues, so we went and knocked
out a quick bounty mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0031
rows.name:
But during the fight, I tore off a simius's
arm and it got all enraged on us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0032
rows.name:
Damn thing ended up putting one of my team
in the Blue Blood Maintenance Center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0033
rows.name:
Goddammit! Why'd we have to land on
such a flaming turd of a planet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0046
rows.name:
Heh heh heh. Looks like Gerome
finally stopped screwing around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0047
rows.name:
Now he can go burn off all that anger
that's been eating at him since the
Ma-non took over Army Pizza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG0048
rows.name:
Ah, but don't get me wrong. I don't wanna
be starting a war with 'em or nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1049
rows.name:
I totaled my brand-new Doll, and they said
it'll cost me 80 large to salvage it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1050
rows.name:
Well, I went postal when they told me
that. Started screaming about how no
honest man has that kind of scratch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1051
rows.name:
But then, my brother Beats
stepped up and said that he'd
pay the salvage fee for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1052
rows.name:
What the hell, man? He's always complaining
about how crappy the Union rewards are for
Companion, and then he goes and does that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1053
rows.name:
What an idiot. ...Still, I guess I'd better
take on a big mission so I can get some
cash and buy him a nice steak dinner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1060
rows.name:
I can't believe that douchebag at the
pizza place tried to frame Gerome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1061
rows.name:
Things got so bad there, I was
worried that the Ma-non might
retaliate against us humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1062
rows.name:
Instead they're all "Um, so so so
now we can't get our usual pizza
anymore, right?" ...And that was it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015701_MSG1063
rows.name:
I can't believe how forgiving
they are! ...Or maybe they're
just complete morons.[ST:wait ]
